results.title: Awesome Claude Skills
results.description: Awesome Claude Skills is a curated collection of practical, customizable Claude Skills—workflows for Claude.ai, Claude Code, and the Claude API—that accelerate document processing, development, analysis, creative tasks, and integrations, with guides for creating and contributing skills.

results.title: Office Document Skills for Claude Code
results.description: This project provides professional Office document creation and editing workflows for the command line, powered by Claude Code, supporting formats like PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF for automation and custom workflows.

results.title: Skill Seeker
results.description: Automatically convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills in minutes.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an AI coding assistant (CLI tool) that helps developers with various coding tasks, providing contextual information and best practices based on its documentation.

results.title: Claude Cookbooks
results.description: The Claude Cookbooks provide code and guides to help developers build with Claude, offering copy-able code snippets for easy integration into projects.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line tool for agentic coding that integrates Claude into developer workflows, offering a flexible and customizable platform for best practices across various codebases and environments.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an intelligent AI programming assistant designed to enhance developer efficiency and code quality through features like smart code understanding, real-time pair programming, and AI-assisted debugging.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a platform that allows developers to create, manage, and share Agent Skills to extend and customize the functionalities of the Claude AI.

results.title: Claude Skills Library
results.description: A library of production-ready, modular skill packages designed to augment Claude AI and Claude Code with specialized domain expertise, providing reusable expertise bundles, analysis tools, and strategic frameworks for various professional teams.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line interface and web-based tool that enables developers to interact with Claude AI for code analysis, generation, and debugging with interactive REPL capabilities.

results.title: Claude Code Go
results.description: Golang SDK for Anthropic's Claude Code - A Go wrapper for the command line claude code agent

results.title: Claude Code Cookbook
results.description: A collection of settings and custom commands to enhance the usability of Claude Code, allowing it to automate tasks like code modification, test execution, and documentation updates.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic terminal tool that understands your codebase to help you code faster by executing tasks, explaining code, and handling git workflows through natural language commands.

results.title: Awesome Claude Code
results.description: A curated list of slash-commands, CLAUDE.md files, CLI tools, and other resources to enhance Claude Code workflows and productivity.

results.title: Claude Code Hooks Mastery
results.description: Master Claude Code hooks to control Claude Code's behavior, with features like prompt validation, security enhancements, and TTS alerts.

results.title: Superpowers
results.description: Superpowers provides Claude Code with a comprehensive skills library, including testing, debugging, collaboration, and meta skills, via a plugin that manages and loads skills from a dedicated repository.

results.title: Claude Code Templates
results.description: A collection of ready-to-use configurations for Anthropic's Claude Code, including AI agents, custom commands, settings, hooks, integrations, and project templates to enhance development workflows.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK enables programmatic building of AI agents with Claude Code's capabilities, allowing them to understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and execute complex workflows.

results.title: Anthropic Skills
results.description: Anthropic Skills are folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically to improve performance on specialized tasks, with this repository providing example skills to demonstrate the system's capabilities.

results.title: Claude Code Infrastructure Showcase
results.description: A curated reference library of production-tested Claude Code infrastructure, offering patterns and systems to solve skill auto-activation challenges and scale AI-assisted development for enterprise.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: A local mirror of Claude Code documentation files, providing faster access, automatic updates, and change tracking for improved integration.

results.title: Claude Code Tools
results.description: A collection of tools, hooks, and utilities designed to enhance Claude Code and other CLI coding agents, enabling programmatic control over terminal applications.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: A local mirror and command-line tool that provides fast, automatically updated access to official Claude Code documentation and its changelog.

results.title: Claude Code Agent Development Kit
results.description: A Python framework for building Claude Code agents with custom tools, leveraging Claude Code's reasoning capabilities in Docker-isolated environments for production workflows.

results.title: DOTCLAUDE
results.description: DOTCLAUDE provides personal Claude Code configuration files, including custom agents, language guidelines, templates, and settings, for enhanced AI-assisted development.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal and helps developers build features, debug issues, and automate tasks using AI.

results.title: Claude Code Go SDK
results.description: A Go SDK for Claude Code that provides programmatic access to Claude's agentic coding capabilities, wrapping the Claude Code CLI with a Go-native interface.

results.title: Claude Code Development Kit
results.description: An integrated system that transforms Claude Code into an orchestrated development environment through automated documentation management, multi-agent workflows, and external AI expertise.

results.title: OpenSkills
results.description: OpenSkills is a CLI tool that replicates Anthropic's Claude Code skills system, enabling universal access to skill management, installation, and invocation for various AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and Aider.
